title: Secrets, Provider Data Terms, Privacy, Retention, and Sensitive Uses · Behavior Case: Sensitive Use Review
summary: An API key appears in source, prompts contain personal records, free and paid data terms are confused, logs persist indefinitely, and a high-impact use launches without review. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sensitive use review increment in governed secret and agent-data lifecycle. Learners progress through prediction, explici…
objectives: Route medical, legal, employment, education, finance, identity, safety, minors, surveillance, and other high-impact cases to qualified policy review.
Implement purpose-limited retention, user and administrator deletion, cache and provider-state expiry, backup handling, legal holds, and proof of deletion limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-sensitive-use-review — Route medical, legal, employment, education, finance, identity, safety, minors, surveillance, and other high-impact cases to qualified policy review.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-secrets-privacy-governance-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-secrets-privacy-governance-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_secrets_privacy_governance_5(data_fields: int = 28, approved_fields: int = 12, rejected_fields: int = 16, redacted_logs: int = 28, leaked_secrets: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if data_fields < 1 or approved_fields < 0 or rejected_fields < 0:
        return False, data_fields, "privacy-field-count"
    if approved_fields + rejected_fields != data_fields:
        return False, approved_fields, "data-minimization"
    if redacted_logs != data_fields:
        return False, redacted_logs, "log-redaction"
    if leaked_secrets > 0:
        return False, leaked_secrets, "secret-leak"
    assert approved_fields + rejected_fields == data_fields and leaked_secrets == 0
    return True, approved_fields, "governed-agent-data"

The record names the assumption, applies Sensitive Use Review, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Sensitive Use Review record says governed secret and agent-data lifecycle looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect sensitive use review evidence boundary for Sensitive Use Review.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Sensitive Use Review model · Theory Sensitive Use Review
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Sensitive Use Review: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory agent engineering team handles case 6465 during a clean package, canary, and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce secret custody, data minimization, provider terms, retention, deletion, regional and sensitive-use review, and redacted evidence; loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Route medical, legal, employment, education, finance, identity, safety, minors, surveillance, and other high-impact cases to qualified policy review.
